questions.question: What is the time complexity of inserting a new node at the beginning of a singly linked list, assuming the head node is stored in a variable 'head'?
Describe the difference between deleting a node with only one child and deleting a node with two children in a singly linked list.
questions.hint: Consider the impact on the linked list structure

questions.question: Suppose you have a singly linked list with the following nodes: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5. What is the output of the display operation when you start displaying the list from the middle node?
